evals.prompt: I found a reference to a book called 'The Great Gatsby' by F. Scott Fitzgerald in an old syllabus. Can you look it up in Harvard's library catalog and get me the full bibliographic details — ISBN, publisher, date, subjects?
evals.expected_output: Bibliographic record(s) for The Great Gatsby from LibraryCloud with ISBN, publisher, date, and subject headings
expectations: LibraryCloud Item API was queried (api.lib.harvard.edu/v2/items)
JSON format was requested (.json extension or Accept header)
Title and/or author were used as search parameters
At least one matching record was found and presented
Bibliographic details include publisher, date, and at least one subject term
An ISBN or other identifier is included in the results

evals.prompt: I need to find Chinese rare books in Harvard's collection — specifically woodblock-printed texts from before 1800. Can you search for these and tell me what genres and languages are represented?
evals.expected_output: Search results for Chinese rare books with faceted breakdown by genre and language
expectations: LibraryCloud was queried with relevant search terms (Chinese rare books, woodblock, etc.)
Results were filtered or searched to focus on pre-1800 materials
Facets or categorization by genre is presented
Language distribution is shown (Chinese should dominate)
Multiple records are listed with titles

evals.prompt: I have a HOLLIS number 011557057 from an old Harvard catalog card. Can you pull up the full record and tell me what book this is?
evals.expected_output: Full catalog record for HOLLIS 011557057 identified as 'The Ruby Programming Language' by David Flanagan
expectations: PRESTO endpoint was used to retrieve the record (webservices.lib.harvard.edu/rest/)
The book was correctly identified as 'The Ruby Programming Language'
Author David Flanagan is mentioned
Publisher (O'Reilly) and/or date (2008) are included
The record format used was MARC, MODS, or Dublin Core

evals.prompt: Search Harvard's library for works about the Silk Road published between 1990 and 2010 that are available online. How many are there, and what are the top subjects?
evals.expected_output: Search results for Silk Road works (1990-2010) with online availability filter and subject breakdown
expectations: LibraryCloud was queried with subject or keyword 'Silk Road'
Date range filtering was applied (dates.start/dates.end or dateIssued)
Online availability was filtered (isOnline=true or similar)
A count of matching records is provided
Subject terms or facets are listed showing thematic distribution
